title: Media Feed
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California lacks a federally accredited tribal college, despite having the highest number of Native Americans in the nation.",
    "The investment of $10 million in California Indian Nations College (CINC) aims to address educational disparities for Native American students, who have the lowest college-going rate in California.",
    "CINC offers culturally grounded and inclusive education that serves both Native and non-Native students.",
    "Accreditation signifies that an institution meets established standards in areas such as academic quality, financial stability, and governance.",
    "CINC has received previous funding of $5 million in 2022 to aid its accreditation quest and $9 million in seed funding from the Twenty-Nine Palms Band of Mission Indians.",
    "The process for obtaining federal accreditation may take several years and requires a significant investment by the institution."
  ]
}
```
